institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Agricultural & Environmental Systems — Agribusiness
tagline: Growing Business from the Ground Up
programDescription: The Agribusiness concentration prepares students to manage agricultural enterprises, commodity marketing, and food supply chains. Coursework integrates economics, finance, management, and agricultural science to develop leaders who can navigate the business side of food and fiber production. Students gain real-world experience through internships with agribusinesses, cooperatives, and USDA agencies.

careerOutlook.outlook: Agribusiness professionals manage the $1.2 trillion U.S. food and agriculture sector. Demand is strong for managers who combine agricultural knowledge with business acumen, especially in precision agriculture and sustainable food systems.
